coordinator_assignment.pl: :username to nowy uczestnik kampanii :campaignname, którą prowadzisz. Dostępne cele zostały automatycznie przypisane.
coordinator_assignment.en: :username is a new participant in campaign :campaignname that you coordinate. Available objectives were assigned automatically.
coordinator_assignment.it: :username is a new participant in campagna :campaignname that you coordinate. Available obiettivi were assigned automatically.

user_assigned.en: You were assigned to campaign :campaignname.
user_assigned.it: You were assigned to campagna :campaignname.

empty.pl: Twoja skrzynka powiadomień jest pusta, nie otrzymano jeszcze żadnych wiadomości.
empty.en: Your notifications inbox is empty; no messages have been received yet.
empty.it: La tua casella notifiche è vuota; non sono ancora stati ricevuti messaggi.

preview_empty.pl: Wybierz powiadomienie z listy, aby zobaczyć pełną treść.
preview_empty.en: Select a notification from the list to see the full content.
preview_empty.it: Seleziona una notifica dall'elenco per vedere il contenuto completo.
